markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 26, 2026 8 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 88.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Lorenzo Rottoli wins the Dlimi vs Rottoli professional tennis match in the 2026 M25 Tanger Semifinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Dlimi vs Rottoli professional tennis match in the 2026 M25 Tanger Semifinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Lorenzo Rottoli win the Dlimi vs Rottoli: M25 Tanger Semifinal match?

markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump has taken at least 7 presidential actions from Jun 28, 2026 through Jul 4, 2026 (as checked on the “Presidential Actions” page at whitehouse.gov at 10:00 AM ET on Jul 5, 2026), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market solely resolves to the publication dates visibly displayed on the "Presidential Actions" tab at whitehouse.gov at at 10:00 AM ET on Jul 5, 2026. The week runs from Jun 28, 2026 through Jul 4, 2026. The actions may include proclamations, executive orders, nominations & appointments, and memoranda. Any item listed on the page counts, regardless of its legal effect.

Examples (for Jan 10, 2026):

Executive Order with a Jan 7 signing date is released with a Jan 10 publication date → resolves Yes
Proclamation e-mailed to White House Press Pool but not uploaded by 10:00 AM next day → resolves No
Proclamation is released Jan 10 with a backdated Jan 9 publication date → resolves No
Bill signed into law and shows up on "Briefings & Statements" instead of "Presidential Actions" → resolves No
markets.title: Will there be at least 7 presidential actions in the week of Jun 28, 2026?

markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump endorses at least 50 people for their election on Truth Social from Jun 28, 2026 through Jul 4, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Any formal endorsement will qualify, including reaffirmations of prior endorsements. If Trump endorses multiple people in an election, all will be counted towards the total. The endorsement must be a clear, affirmative statement of support. Ambiguous statements of support will not qualify. A person cannot be counted more than once in a given week.

Examples:
Donald Trump states "I endorse [candidate] for [office]"
Donald Trump states "I support [candidate]" referencing a political race
Donald Trump states "Vote for [candidate]" publicly
Donald Trump states "[candidate] has my full support" for [race]

Examples that would NOT count:
Trump posts a graphic that says "[Candidate] wins" that merely states as fact they were endorsed by President Trump
markets.title: Will Trump endorse at least 50 people on Truth Social this week?

markets.rules_primary: If the number of Truth Social posts by Donald Trump from Jun 28, 2026 to Jul 4, 2026 is below 80, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The observation period begins at 12:00 AM ET on Jun 28, 2026 and ends at 11:59 PM ET on Jul 4, 2026. The primary resolution source for this market is Roll Call. In the event that Roll Call data is unavailable or inaccurate, alternative sources may be used at Kalshi's discretion. Truths, ReTruths, and Quote Truths are included in the total count. Replies are included only if captured by Roll Call. The post count will be recorded at 10:00 AM ET on Jul 5, 2026. Posts deleted as of the Expiration Time will not be included. "Between" is inclusive of the lower and upper bound.
markets.title: Will Donald Trump make below 80 Truth Social posts the week of Jun 28, 2026?

In the event that Roll Call data is unavailable or inaccurate, alternative sources may be used at Kalshi's discretion. Truths, ReTruths, and Quote Truths are included in the total count. Replies are included only if captured by Roll Call. The post count will be recorded at 10:00 AM ET on Jul 5, 2026. Posts deleted as of the Expiration Time will not be included. markets.title: Will Donald Trump make between 80 and 99 Truth Social posts the week of Jun 28, 2026?

markets.rules_primary: If the number of Truth Social posts by Donald Trump from Jun 28, 2026 to Jul 4, 2026 is between 200 and 220, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The observation period begins at 12:00 AM ET on Jun 28, 2026 and ends at 11:59 PM ET on Jul 4, 2026. The primary resolution source for this market is Roll Call. In the event that Roll Call data is unavailable or inaccurate, alternative sources may be used at Kalshi's discretion. Truths, ReTruths, and Quote Truths are included in the total count. Replies are included only if captured by Roll Call. The post count will be recorded at 10:00 AM ET on Jul 5, 2026. Posts deleted as of the Expiration Time will not be included. "Between" is inclusive of the lower and upper bound.
markets.title: Will Donald Trump make between 200 and 220 Truth Social posts the week of Jun 28, 2026?
